description: Use this API to disconnect the third bus of a specified three-winding transformer from the bus to which it is currently connected, and reconnect it to a designated bus. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = move3wnd(ibus, jbus1, jbus2, ckt, newtobus2, newckt)
python_syntax: ierr = move3wnd(ibus, jbus1, jbus2, ckt, newtobus2, newckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: One of the buses connected by the three-winding transformer; the transformer will remain connected to this bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus1
parameters.description: Other bus connected by the three-winding transformer; the transformer will remain connected to this bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus2
parameters.description: Third bus connected by the three-winding transformer; this connection will be severed and the transformer connected to bus newtobus2. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of the three-winding transformer to be rerouted. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: newtobus2
parameters.description: Number of the bus to which the three-winding transformer is to be connected. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newckt
parameters.description: New circuit identifier to be assigned to the rerouted three-winding transformer. (input; CKT by default).

error_codes.description: new connection bus must not be the present from or to buses.
circuit NEWCKT from IBUS to JBUS1 to NEWTOBUS2 already exists.
invalid new identifier; cannot start with &, * or @
invalid new identifier; must not be blank.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
